## 🚀 Description

<!-- Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Please also include relevant motivation and context. -->

Fixes # (issue)

## 🛠 Type of change

<!-- Please delete options that are not relevant. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / performance improvement

## 🎨 Material Design 3 Expressive Validation

<!-- For UI/Component changes, confirm alignment with the design system. -->

- [ ] Verified alignment with MD3 visual guidelines (Shape, Color, Typography).
- [ ] Verified motion animations (if any) are intentional and use the library's spring/easing tokens.
- [ ] Confirmed dynamic theme support (primary, secondary, error, etc.) works correctly.

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) document.
- [ ] My code passes `pnpm check` with **0 errors and 0 warnings**.
- [ ] I have run `tsc --noEmit` locally with **0 errors**.
- [ ] I have added/updated tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (`apps/docs/`) if introducing a new component or changing API.
- [ ] I have verified that the component meets a11y standards (Keyboard navigation, screen reader labels).

## 📸 Screenshots (if appropriate)
